Hero.title: This name is based on a basic concept of total quality. Every company must have a vision of what it wants to become.

AboutPage.title: What You See Is What You Get
AboutPage.description: This name is based on a basic concept of total quality. Every company must have a vision of what it wants to become. Give our clients and us the means to manage and improve their activities successfully with innovative IT solutions.
AboutPage.Wysiwyg: Wysiwyg is committed to treating the skills of its clients as if they were their own.

services.label: AI Automation
services.description: Automate your tasks using the best tools and integrate them into your projects with optimization capabilities.

services.label: Axelor ERP
services.description: A powerful and customizable solution to simplify your business management. CRM, accounting, inventory, HR — centralize all your business processes on a single platform.

services.label: Application Development
services.description: From design and development to maintenance and management of software applications.

services.label: Visual Planning
services.description: The essential tool to efficiently organize and monitor your projects. Resource planning, schedule management, and real-time activity tracking.

services.label: BlueMind Messaging
services.description: A collaborative platform to optimize your communications. Professional email, shared calendars, unified contacts — a sovereign and high-performance solution.

services.label: Managed IT Services
services.description: A high-performance and secure IT infrastructure. We handle the management, monitoring, and optimization of your information systems to ensure availability and performance.

NosServices.title: Our Services
NosServices.descritpion1: A significant contribution to your financial performance through reliable and accessible information, relevant reporting, and in-depth analysis that improve decision-making and the efficiency of accounting processes.
NosServices.descritpion2: Globalization and market evolution have increased the demands for meeting deadlines, responsiveness, and profitability in the manufacturing process.
NosServices.descritpion3: Business Intelligence (BI) refers to the strategies and technologies employed by organizations to collect, analyze, and transform business data into actionable insights for informed decision-making.
NosServices.description4: Quality management is a management discipline that encompasses all the concepts and methods aimed at ensuring customer satisfaction.
NosServices.descritpion5: WYSIWYG's strategy enables SMEs to optimize and integrate CAD/CAM and ERP solutions through a comprehensive and integrated approach.
NosServices.descritpion6: Today, supply chains are more interconnected, complex, and global, ensuring efficient production and delivery to customers.

WhyUs.title: Why choose us?
WhyUs.descriptionW1: Development of custom professional software solutions tailored to your needs.
WhyUs.descriptionW2: Optimize management and improve your processes for a more efficient and high-performing organization.
WhyUs.descriptionW3: Business Intelligence (BI) encompasses the strategies and technologies used by companies to analyze business data and information.

Offers.title: Related Offers
Offers.descriptionS1: We provide this service to handle your ticket and ensure the fastest possible resolution.
Offers.descriptionS2: Our teams support you in all daily tasks related to managing your IT infrastructure.
Offers.descriptionS3: Outsourcing your IT system ensures access to top-level expertise on demand without budget constraints.
Offers.descriptionS4: IT infrastructure management enables efficient administration of your computer systems.

Contact.description: The company also provides training and consulting services in production management, Information and Communication Technologies, and quality management.

services.label: AI Automation
services.description: In an increasingly mobile environment, companies and providers are constantly looking for ways to offer users a secure working experience, wherever they are. With our solution, deployment and management of the desktop environment are simplified.

services.label: Axelor ERP
services.description: A powerful and customizable solution to simplify your business management. CRM, accounting, inventory, HR — centralize all your business processes on a single platform.

services.label: Offsite Backup
services.description: Protect and securely back up your data against theft, loss, and cyberattacks in our latest-generation French data centers. It is the lifeline of your data.

services.label: Web Hosting
services.description: With our Monitoring & Security service, focus on your core business while we take care of the protection and supervision of your infrastructure.

services.label: Cloud Hosting
services.description: Instead of investing in an internal infrastructure, choose dedicated hosting for your servers, applications, and data in our French data centers.

cards.title: An expert team
cards.description: A professional team consisting of engineers, system administrators, sales staff, and support technicians.
cards.hoverDescription: Our team supports companies in their infrastructure, cloud, cybersecurity, and digital transformation projects.

cards.title: Full range of solutions and services
cards.description: WYSIWYG holds numerous certifications validating our technical expertise. Our approach to solving client needs makes us experts across a wide range of fields.
cards.hoverDescription: ERP, Cloud, Infrastructure, Cybersecurity, AI, and managed services to meet all your needs.

cards.title: Customer satisfaction
cards.description: The trust of our clients is the driving force behind our growth and quality commitment. We are proud of our 207 corporate clients. This number continues to grow.
cards.hoverDescription: We are proud of our 207 corporate clients. This number continues to grow.

Footer.description: WYSIWYG was founded on April 1st, 1999 by Xavier LOPEZ.
